Landscape biomass summary by species

biomass_landscape_summary.Rd

Aggregates per-cell snapshot data to landscape-mean biomass density (Mg C ha^-1) per species per timestep per replicate, then computes mean ?+/- SD across replicates.

Usage

biomass_landscape_summary(df)

Arguments

df

data.table or data.frame as returned by read_biomass_c_snapshots().

Value

A tibble with columns Time, species, mean_biomass, sd_biomass.

See also

Other Vegetation transition helpers: community_label(), leading_species(), plot_species_biomass(), plot_transitions(), read_biomass_c_snapshots(), read_biomass_output_rasters(), transition_data()
